label: Danogo
caption: Concentrated Liquidity DEX on Cardano
summary: Danogo CLMM is a concentrated liquidity market maker (Uniswap V3-style) on Cardano, enabling capital-efficient swaps with customizable price ranges.
description: Danogo CLMM is a concentrated liquidity market maker on Cardano. Users provide liquidity within custom price ranges for higher capital efficiency. Swaps directly modify pool state (no batcher). Supports ADA pairs and token-to-token pairs.
